texto: Why is it that all the Christians I see on TV shows and movies are nothing like the Christians I know in actual life? The people I know have a sense of humor, aren't shallow, don't feel like they know all the answers, struggle, get scared, have hope, make sense, make peace, and hang on tight to their values because they're worth hanging on to. Have Hollywood writers just never actually set foot in a church???
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Angela Wilhite: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “Why is it that all the Christians I see on TV shows and movies are nothing like the Christians I …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que autoestima, bias, culture pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de culture e engagement.
